data.title: North Jersey Families Have Until March 30 to Lock In 2025 Cemetery Prices
data.description: In Bergen County, New Jersey, a price hike will commence on March 30, 2026. Families in Bergen County and the wider North Jersey area have until this weekend to prepare and secure the current 2025 pricing at two prominent local venues.

data.title: Atos Unveils its Leading-Edge Services to CONMEBOL at the CONMEBOL Libertadores and CONMEBOL Sudamericana Competition Draws
data.description: Atos is set to reveal a comprehensive suite of technology services to bolster CONMEBOL's latest digital era.

data.title: Hyperscale Data Declares Monthly Cash Dividend of $0.2708333 per Share of 13.00% Series D Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock
data.description: Hyperscale Data, Inc. (NYSE American: GPUS) has announced that it will be paying a monthly cash dividend of $0.20833 per share for its 10.00% Series E Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock. This declaration was made in Las Vegas on March 20, 2026. Hyperscale Data operates as an artificial intelligence ("AI") data center company.

data.title: KuCoin Institutional Introduces Quarterly VIP Level Shield to Strengthen Stability for VIP Traders
data.description: In Providenciales, Turks and Caicos Islands, on March 20, 2026, KuCoin Insititutional unveiled their latest initiative - the Quarterly VIP Level Shield. This innovative loyalty program aims to offer enhanced stability and security to elite traders on the platform. This strategic move is set to benefit high-tier traders by providing them with a safeguard against market fluctuations and uncertainties. Through this new structural mechanism, KuCoin Institutional is elevating its commitment to fostering a secure trading environment for its valued users.

data.title: Best Rx Frames & Optical Glasses (2026): Quay Named Top Stylish Prescription Eyewear by Expert Consumers
data.description: In a recent report released on March 20, 2026, Expert Consumers identified Quay as one of the leading prescription eyewear brands for style. The 2026 feature highlighted Quay for its trendy optical glasses and RX frames, showcasing a surge in the popularity of prescription eyewear that seamlessly blends contemporary aesthetics with functionality. This acknowledgment underscores the increasing demand for fashionable yet practical eyewear choices among consumers.

data.title: Tuniu Announces Plan to Implement ADS Ratio Change and Declares Cash Dividend
data.description: On March 20, 2026, in Nanjing, China, Tuniu Corporation (NASDAQ: TOUR) revealed its intention to adjust the ratio of its American depositary shares ("ADSs") to Class A ordinary shares. Tuniu is a prominent online leisure travel firm in China. The company is taking this step to enhance its financial structure and operational efficiency, aiming to strengthen its position in the market. Details regarding the specific ratio change and its implications were not immediately provided. Stay tuned for updates on this strategic development from Tuniu Corporation, as they navigate the dynamic landscape of the travel industry.

data.title: 12 Press Releases You Need to See This Week
data.description: In New York on March 20, 2026, a myriad of noteworthy events unfolded in the business world. Taco Bell and Zillow both announced the launch of new products, adding to their extensive offerings. On the other hand, IBM made headlines with its acquisition news involving the Ferrero Group. Such developments showcase the dynamic nature of the market and serve as indicators of growth and expansion. Amidst the hustle and bustle of the ever-evolving business landscape, staying informed is crucial for journalists and consumers seeking to navigate the plethora of press releases that flood platforms like PR Newswire every week.
